summary: Tested Reports & Analytics page - All 17 backend API tests passed, all frontend UI tests passed. The page correctly displays comprehensive analytics with period selector (1mo/3mo/6mo/1yr) and 5 section tabs (Overview, Products, Customers, Orders, Activity). All charts render correctly using Recharts.
seed_data_creation: Used existing orders, doctors, medicals, agencies, payments data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reports & Analytics page fully tested. Key components verified: 1) Backend: GET /api/analytics/reports?period={1month|3months|6months|1year} returns all required data fields. 2) Frontend: Reports.jsx at /admin/reports with data-testid attributes. 3) Period selector changes data correctly. 4) All 5 section tabs work: Overview (stat cards, Revenue & Orders Trend chart, Order Status pie, Payment Modes bar), Products (Top Products bar chart + table, Slow Movers table, Products by Qty chart), Customers (Top Doctors/Medicals/Agencies cards with progress bars, Frequent Orderers table, Dormant Customers with 30/60/90 day tabs), Orders (Avg Order Value, Monthly Order Count chart, Orders by Day of Week bar, Order Status Breakdown), Activity (Monthly Revenue bar, Customer Distribution pie, Dormant Summary). 5) All charts use Recharts library.

Backend API Tests.frequent_orderers structure: PASS - name, orders, revenue, last_order (3+ orders)

Frontend UI Tests.Period selector (1 Month, 3 Months, 6 Mo: PASS - All buttons clickable, data refreshes
Frontend UI Tests.Overview - Summary stat cards: PASS - Total Revenue, Total Orders, Total Payments, Total Customers with D/M/A breakdown
Frontend UI Tests.Products - Top Products table: PASS - name, qty, revenue, orders columns

data_testid_attributes_verified: period-1month, period-3months, period-6months, period-1year - Period buttons
section-overview, section-products, section-customers, section-orders, section-activity - Section tabs
stat-total-revenue, stat-total-orders, stat-total-payments, stat-total-customers - Stat cards
dormant-30_days, dormant-60_days, dormant-90_days - Dormant period tabs
mocked_apis_note: NO MOCKS - All APIs are real. Data comes from MongoDB aggregation pipelines.
